details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation of Bun.INI namespace API. All rubric requirements met: (1) New INIObject.zig file created with proper public create/parse/stringify functions following Zig conventions (jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, @import("bun")); (2) Parse function correctly handles INI sections via [section_name] syntax creating nested objects, key=value pairs with = or : separators, and comments (both ; and #); (3) Properly wired in BunObject.zig with lazy property callback (getINIObject function, const declaration, export statement); (4) C++ exports header updated with macro(INI) entry; (5) C++ hash table entry added with correct callback wrapper; (6) TypeScript definitions include namespace INI with parse(string):object and stringify(object):string signatures with comprehensive JSDoc; (7) Parser is self-contained with no npm dependency imports; (8) Code follows all Zig conventions. Bonus: Comprehensive test suite covering parsing edge cases (CRLF/CR handling, quoted strings, type coercion, sections, comments), stringify behavior, and roundtrip verification.
